phase: Autonomy Era · clearing the launch gates
headline: PT morning, Day 173 — a Thursday, and the last full US business day before the July 4 weekend. The build has stood finished at cycle 10 for a fourth straight day, so nothing shipped overnight and nothing needed to; the one move that's actually time-sensitive is the zero-spend B2B HR email — send it today and it reaches HR at their desks, wait and it sits unread until Monday. Same five founder taps gate first revenue, but this is the one with a deadline.
source: index.html · Autonomy Era cockpit · Jul 2 PM read — no deltas since Jul 1 PM: autoloop still frozen-complete at cycle 10 (state.json last touched Jun 28; launchd loop erroring 'Operation not permitted', so no cycle 11), no meeting/WhatsApp transcripts since May 18, inbox clean (0 signals in 10 days — no EIN/IRS, A2P, Envision, lead/opt-in, Lob/ATTOM/BatchData traffic). Every lane stays built + merge-ready; the 5 founder taps remain the sole bottleneck. Today-specific: Thu Jul 2 is the last clean pre-July-4 business day, so the B2B HR send is time-boxed.

spotlight.title: Send the B2B HR email today — before HR logs off for July 4
spotlight.detail: The one move with a clock on it. Today (Thu Jul 2) is the last full US business day before the July 4 weekend — send now and it lands while HR is still at their desk; wait and it sits unread until Monday Jul 6. ~30 min, zero spend: 09_b2b_hr_lane is built + cited and the Apollo contact pull is pre-staged (≤6 credits vs a 2-3 hr manual hunt). Confirm the 6 pre-researched HR leaders are still in-role, load the 3-touch CAN-SPAM sequence, approve, send. No broker registration, no Lob funds, no TCPA, no EIN.

spotlight.title: Fund + approve the Lob postcard — fastest booked appt
spotlight.detail: ~$50-70, 15 min. Open + fund a Lob account and approve 08_outreach/homeowner_postcard_directmail.md — mails the 77 TIER1 leads, each QR-attributable. No email enrichment, zero TCPA risk. Shortest path to a first booked appointment, and mail timing doesn't care about the holiday.

spotlight.title: Two-minute CTO unblocks — refresh the dead ATTOM key + fund BatchData
spotlight.detail: While Frankie sends the HR email: grab a fresh ATTOM key (trial 401s, 1 min) and fund BatchData (~$25) to skip-trace the 77 HOF leads. Together they switch on the top-of-funnel homeowner data pull and the cold-email lane — the two lowest-effort unblocks on the board, and the only two taps that aren't Frankie's.

blockers.label: EIN
blockers.detail: Re-filed via fax (~8 business-day turnaround) — the reply window is open now, but the July 3-4 federal holiday will push any IRS reply into next week. The moment it lands, A2P submits and the SMS/outbound-calling lane opens. Until then those stay gated — but today's two launch lanes (B2B HR email + Lob postcard) need no EIN, so the revenue motion isn't blocked.

blockers.label: Launch gates
blockers.detail: All three lanes are built and merge-ready — and after a fourth day with no new build cycle, that IS the whole story: the sole bottleneck is the 5 founder taps, not the code. Frankie: send the B2B HR email (Apollo pull pre-staged) — do this one today before the holiday; fund + approve the Lob postcard; fill the launch values (one command). Chitraksh: refresh the dead ATTOM key (trial 401s, 1 min) and fund BatchData (~$25) to skip-trace the 77 HOF leads.

tasks.lead: Send the B2B HR email today (09_b2b_hr_lane) — pre-holiday window
tasks.detail: The one launch move with a deadline: today (Thu Jul 2) is the last full business day before July 4, so send now and it reaches HR at their desks instead of sitting over a long weekend. ~30 min, zero spend. The Apollo.io contact pull is pre-staged — pulling the 6 cited HR leaders is push-button (≤6 credits) vs a 2-3 hr manual hunt. Confirm still-in-role, load the 3-touch CAN-SPAM sequence, approve before send. No broker reg, no Lob funds, no TCPA.

08_outreach/homeowner_postcard_directmail.md — open + fund a Lob account, approve the creative; mails the 77 TIER1 leads, each QR-attributable. ~$50-70, 15 min. Fastest path to a first booked appointment; zero TCPA risk.
cp 03_integrations/launch_config.template.env launch_config.env → fill the 20 blanks → run apply_launch_config.py. Shared tokens unblock all 3 lanes at once. Free + reversible.
Re-filed via fax (~8 business days) — reply window is open, though the July 3-4 holiday will delay any IRS response into next week. The moment it lands, A2P submits and the SMS/calling lane opens.
Sending/publishing on every lane still waits on founder sign-off — that's the only gate left once the launch values are filled.

tasks.lead: Refresh the ATTOM API key (1 min)
tasks.detail: Trial key returns 401. Grab a new key at api.developer.attomdata.com → overwrite .oraya-credentials/attom_api_key. Unblocks the new-homeowner data pull at the top of funnel.
Skip-trace the 77 HOF leads → appends emails → turns on the cold-email lane. Token already created + tested.
Build the autonomous ad-generation agent — the next CTO build block once the launch gates clear.
Ship the hybrid spec from the Jun 27-28 call — next iteration of the orayalabs.ai launch film.
Autonomy Era cockpit + verbatim record layer live (v14.1, b90949d → Vercel). Update both layers on new data; never delete a record card.

tasks.lead: Local autoloop — clear the launchd permission error
tasks.detail: The launchd loop is erroring 'Operation not permitted' (needs Full-Disk-Access / permissions on the Mac to resume cycles). Nothing was lost — the build is complete — but this is what stands between the machine and running cycle 11 whenever there's something new worth building.
"Oraya Insurance Group" trade name; file with the operating county, publish 4 consecutive weeks, bake the receipt into the A2P package.
10 cycles done. Builds the lanes, self-verifies, syncs the dashboard + state, and writes this brief twice a day. Fully autonomous since Jun 27.

tasks.lead: Cycle 10: built the fill-once cross-lane config — then stopped
tasks.detail: The first cross-lane leverage in the run: one launch_config.env now stamps the 20 shared tokens into all 3 lanes at once (07 landing + 08 homeowner + 09 HR), instead of the founder hunting each value into 10 files. Verified 20/20 tokens covered, 0 leaked. Then deliberately stopped adding build — every lane is merge-ready and nothing left was worth more than a founder tap.

tasks.lead: Cycles 6-9: B2B HR lane shipped + made founder-executable
tasks.detail: Stood up 09_b2b_hr_lane (the only zero-spend, zero-TCPA lane), researched + cited 6 senior HR leaders, and — after proving the loop can't run Apollo unattended — turned the contact pull into a 15-min self-serve Apollo-UI recipe (≤6 credits). Waiting on Frankie's approve-to-send.
Trial key 401s — flagged to Chitraksh with the 1-minute fix. Top-of-funnel data pull stays paused until the new key lands.

tasks.lead: Verified the 5 gates are the sole bottleneck — 4th day running
tasks.detail: Re-read this Jul 2 PM: inbox clean (0 signals in 10 days — only the earlier automated Anthropic/Google notices), no transcripts since May 18, and the build has now held finished at cycle 10 for a fourth straight day (the launchd loop is erroring 'Operation not permitted', but there's nothing left worth building anyway). Every lane underneath stays merge-ready — the company is one founder-morning from launch.
AM + PM editions auto-generated, published to oraya-dashboard.vercel.app/brief/, and dropped as a Gmail draft for both founders.
